scope.summary: Render the account's own messages sent from another Zalo device (the original Zalo app on phone/web). Root cause: the production session-start path (command/login_and_listen) logs in via zalo::login(credentials), which calls zalo::login_with(.., self_listen=false). With self_listen=false the zca-rust realtime listener drops every event where message.is_self (src/listen.rs: `if message.is_self && !self_listen { continue; }` at the pinned rev c95c88b), so zca-desktop only ever sees other people's incoming messages and never the user's own outbound messages from other devices. The whole downstream pipeline already carries and handles is_self/isSelf correctly (to_incoming_message copies is_self, the bridge emits without direction filtering, persist_incoming uses bump_unread=!is_self, the frontend renders outgoing: msg.isSelf, and both the SQLite store and the frontend session store already dedupe same-device send echoes from fix-outgoing-echo-dupe). Fix: enable self_listen on the production listen path so self-authored messages are delivered, by making command/login_and_listen log in with zalo::login_with(credentials, true) instead of zalo::login(credentials). No new layer, no new public API, no IPC shape change.
goals: command/: login_and_listen establishes the session with self_listen enabled so the realtime listener surfaces the account's own messages (sent from any device)
Messages the user sends from the original Zalo app now render in the active conversation as outgoing bubbles in realtime
Same-device send echoes are still reconciled (no duplicate row/bubble) via the existing store + frontend dedupe
Self messages do not bump the unread badge (existing bump_unread=!is_self preserved)
nonGoals: Changing the zalo-layer login/login_with API surface (login_with already exists and is used by live tests)
Widening the listener to non-message events (typing/seen/reactions stay ignored this slice)
Reworking the echo-dedupe heuristic (covered by fix-outgoing-echo-dupe)
Any frontend/UI change (the UI already renders isSelf as outgoing)

acceptance.description: cargo test offline suite stays green with the self_listen-enabled production listen path (no regression in store dedupe / routing tests).
cargo clippy is clean with the login_and_listen change.
src-tauri compiles with login_and_listen using zalo::login_with(credentials, true).

Live: with the app listening on an account, send a message to that account's thread from the original Zalo app on another device; the message renders in zca-desktop as an outgoing bubble in realtime and is persisted exactly once. Verified by the project owner on the running app; the success marker is captured in a non-secret evidence sidecar.
